description: The legal operator replaced the generic title '**LEGAL MEMO**' with the firm-specific, personalized header '**MEMO BY HARVEY**'. This indicates a preference for emphasizing the supervising partner's authority and firm's internal nomenclature over standard document labeling.
suggested_instruction: When drafting legal memos for Pearson Specter Litt, replace the standard '**LEGAL MEMO**' header with '**MEMO BY HARVEY**' to align with the supervising partner's branding and the firm's specific delivery style.
